title: Verify responsive layouts and successful production build
completion_summary: Build validation passed: next build succeeds, static export generates all routes (/, /store, /cart, /404), ESLint clean, no type errors
acceptance_criteria: next build runs successfully with zero errors and outputs to configured dist directory.
Static export is generated with all routes reachable as HTML files.
Layouts are verified at 375px, 768px, 1024px, and 1440px without horizontal overflow.
All pages render without JavaScript console errors related to cart or routing.
No missing required fields in task subtasks; any build warnings are documented.
Cart state persists across page reloads within the same browser session.
